## **Ads pressure** {#theme-ads}

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Alice Campbell_, Jun 8, 2026, 5/5: "I love this app! It is a simple but effective way to keep up with your habits and track them over time, and I love all the jar customisation. P.S please can we have a little tinkly sound effect when we put the marble in the jar 😆😆😆"
